name: Component Tracking for Server Upgrade Campaign
description: Your company's datacenter is undergoing a server memory upgrade project. As the datacenter technician, you need to register new RAM components in Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000, login: admin / password) and track their installation into specific servers. Create a new component category named 'Server Memory' (Category Type: Component). Register two components in this category: 'Samsung 32GB DDR4-3200 ECC RDIMM' (Total Quantity: 16, Minimum Quantity: 4, Cost: 89.99, Location: Austin DC) and 'Kingston 64GB DDR5-4800 ECC RDIMM' (Total Quantity: 8, Minimum Quantity: 2, Cost: 199.50, Location: Austin DC). Finally, check out 2 units of the Samsung component to the asset with tag SVR-UPG-001 and 1 unit of the Kingston component to the asset with tag SVR-UPG-002.
